title: Replace map[K]bool with map[K]struct{} where it makes sense
body:
#### What type of PR is this?
/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:
`map[K]struct{}` is go's set type, in various places `map[K]bool` was being used as a set

#### How to verify it
No change in behavior

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:
None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:


#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: changes looks good but can you please squash your commits into one
